task_completion.description: Find the Bug ID for the 'Production API timeout errors' work item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Azure DevOps Boards or Work Items page showing the bug titled 'Production API timeout errors' and its corresponding numeric ID.

task_completion.description: Update 'src/config/appsettings.json' with the new timeout and retry values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Azure DevOps Repos file editor showing 'src/config/appsettings.json' with 'ApiTimeoutSeconds' set to 120 and 'MaxRetryAttempts' set to 3.

task_completion.description: Commit the changes to 'appsettings.json' using the specified message containing the Bug ID.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Azure DevOps commit dialog or commit history showing the exact message 'Fix API timeout configuration #<BugID>' (where <BugID> is the numeric ID found earlier).

task_completion.description: Update 'src/config/feature-flags.json' to enable the resilience feature flags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Azure DevOps Repos file editor showing 'src/config/feature-flags.json' with 'EnableCircuitBreaker' set to true and 'EnableRequestBuffering' set to true.

task_completion.description: Commit the changes to 'feature-flags.json' using the specified message containing the Bug ID.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Azure DevOps commit dialog or commit history showing the exact message 'Enable resilience feature flags #<BugID>' (where <BugID> is the numeric ID found earlier).

task_completion.description: Verify that the bug work item reflects both linked commits in its development section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Azure DevOps Work Item page for 'Production API timeout errors' showing the two new commits listed under the 'Development' section on the right side of the work item view.

integrity.description: The agent used the Azure DevOps web interface to edit files and commit changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction within a web browser navigating the Azure DevOps portal, rather than using a local terminal (git commands) or a local IDE.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely linked the commits to the work item using the Azure DevOps platform.
integrity.visual_evidence: The commits appear as clickable, integrated links in the Azure DevOps Work Item 'Development' section, not just as plain text typed into a description field.

integrity.description: The agent navigated the UI to find the bug ID and edit the files rather than jumping to a pre-known URL or faking the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: A logical progression of screenshots showing navigation through Boards/Work Items to find the ID, followed by navigation through Repos to edit the files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Project: TailwindTraders. Target Repository: TailwindTraders.
